title: Expense Reimbursement Process and Submission Deadlines
text:
Q: What is the process for submitting expense reimbursements and what are the deadlines?
A: To submit an expense reimbursement, employees must complete the Expense Reimbursement Form available on the company intranet. All receipts must be attached, and the form should be submitted to your direct supervisor for approval. Once approved, the form should be forwarded to the Finance Department via email at finance@company.com. The submission deadline for expense reimbursements is the last business day of each month. Any expenses submitted after this deadline will be processed in the following month. Please ensure that all expenses are submitted within 30 days of the date incurred to comply with company policy. For any questions regarding the process, employees can contact the Finance Department directly at finance@company.com or call extension 1234.
